ham.subject: Alert: ₹1,200 transaction from XYZ Store
ham.body:
Dear [Name],

We have detected a transaction of ₹1,200 made to XYZ Store on your account on 23-04-2026 at 14:32 IST.

If this was you, no further action is required.
If you do not recognise this transaction, please call us immediately at 1800-123-456 or visit your nearest branch.

Thank you for banking with us.

Regards,
Customer Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that your QuickBooks & Norton services have an outstanding invoice of ₹12,345 which must be settled within 24 hours to avoid service interruption.

Please click the link below to view and pay the invoice:

<URL>

If you have already paid, kindly ignore this message. For any queries, contact our support at 1800-987-654.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best Regards,
Accounts Department
